## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to its issue (`Closes #…`) and the right epic
- [ ] Both locales covered (pt-BR + English) — or N/A
- [ ] No hard redirect by IP/locale introduced
- [ ] hreflang / canonical correct on affected pages — or N/A
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard, focus, contrast checked — or N/A
- [ ] Core Web Vitals not regressed (images sized, no layout shift) — or N/A
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env.example` updated if needed
- [ ] `typecheck`, `lint`, and `build` pass locally
